ebitda_reported.notes: Restructuring add-back capped by borrower at fixed $8.225M — INCORRECT. Correct cap is 10% of EBITDA (circular, must solve symbolically).

net_debt_reported.notes: Borrower excluded $40M junior subordinated notes from Total Indebtedness without contractual support. Borrower applied $25M cash cap correctly.

errors_present.description: Restructuring add-back capped at fixed $8,225,000 instead of solving 10% of EBITDA symbolically. Correct capped add-back = $13,577,778.
Junior Subordinated Notes ($40M) excluded from Total Indebtedness. No contractual Excluded Indebtedness carve-out found in credit agreement.

independent_recalculation.variance_from_borrower: 2.812x (borrower reported 4.23x, correct is ~1.42x — the borrower understated EBITDA and overstated debt exclusions, both errors partially offset)
